headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Eaton (ETN) After Its Strong Share Price Run?
summary: If you are wondering whether Eaton's current share price still offers value after a strong run, this breakdown will help you see what the numbers are actually saying. The stock last closed at US$410.77, with returns of 19.6% over the past month, 25.5% year to date, and 41.3% over the last year, along with a 0.7% decline over the past week and very large gains over the past three and five years. Recent market attention has focused on Eaton as a key player in capital goods and electrical...
